name: Cranberry Walnut Tart
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Dark brown sugar, firmly packed
1/4 cup Unsalted butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out dough to an 1/8-inch thickness on a floured surface.
2. Fit it into an 11x8 inch rectangular or 10-11 inch round tart pan with a removable fluted rim.
3. Chill the shell for 30 minutes.
4. Line the shell with foil.
5. Fill the foil with rice and bake in the lower third of a preheated 425°F oven for 15 minutes.
6. Remove the foil and rice, then bake the shell an additional 5-10 minutes, or until it is pale golden in color. Let cool in the pan on a rack.
7. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, brown sugar, corn syrup, butter, salt, and vanilla until smooth.
8. Stir in cranberries and walnuts.
9. Pour filling into the shell.
10. Bake in the middle of a preheated 350°F oven for 40-45 minutes, or until golden. Let cool completely in the pan on a rack.
11. Remove the rim of the pan and slide the tart onto a serving plate.
